changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE description IN ('Pus', 'Matériels (Prothèse, Sonde, Stérilet)')

changeSet.comment: sampletype_test : Pus + Matériels -> Microscopie Gram Bactéries Nombre de flore
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.sampletype_test (id, sample_type_id, test_id) SELECT nextval('clinlims.sample_type_test_seq'), tos.id, t.id FROM clinlims.type_of_sample tos CROSS JOIN clinlims.test t WHERE tos.description IN ('Pus', 'Matériels (Prothèse, Sonde, Stérilet)') AND t.name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Nombre de flore' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.sampletype_test st WHERE st.sample_type_id = tos.id AND st.test_id = t.id );
